name: email-draft-save
description: Save an email as a draft without sending it. The CEO can review and send the draft from their email client. Use for observation-mode triage (NEEDS DRAFT category) or when composing a reply that needs CEO approval before sending.

inputs.subject: string (email subject line)
inputs.body: string (email body; markdown supported, converted to HTML automatically)
inputs.account: string? (named account to draft from, as configured in channel_accounts.email. Defaults to the primary account.)
inputs.reply_to_message_id: string? (Nylas message ID to reply to; threads the draft as a reply when set)
